docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $445.55 FILED BY COMBS REPORTING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FRANECKE LAW GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMBS REPORTING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANECKE LAW GROUP $445.55 PRINCIPAL, $41.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $487.05, DEFENDANT'S RECENT PAYMENT OF $445.55 SHAL BE CREDITED TO THIS JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT FRANECKE LAW GROUP NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
